content: README now explicitly frames Phase 0 (UPS template) as the cooperative gate and Phase 2 (PreToolUse + audit) as the enforced backstop. 'When does the block actually fire?' subsection enumerates cooperative / aggressive / non-cooperative / force-bypass cases observed in 0.2.x dogfood. Non-interactive (claude -p) subsection documents 0.2.1's last_assistant_message preference. No code changes; em dashes scrubbed (feedback_no_em_dashes).
